title: Malcore
description:
The Malcore connector imports malware intelligence data from Malcore into OpenCTI.

The connector creates the following OpenCTI entity types:

- File observables (MD5, SHA-1, and SHA-256)
- StixFile indicators (SHA-256)
- Malware

This enables organizations to enrich their threat intelligence with malware file intelligence sourced from Malcore.
short_description: The Malcore connector imports malware intelligence from Malcore into OpenCTI, creating file observables (MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256), StixFile indicators, and malware entities.
